description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a matte olive drab and black color scheme, suitable for urban environments. The body is robust and angular, with a prominent magazine well and a skeletonized, adjustable stock for improved ergonomics and reduced weight. The barrel is short and thick, optimized for maneuverability in close quarters, and the upper receiver is fitted with a circular red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The handguard and grip are integrated into the lower receiver, providing a streamlined appearance and enhanced handling. Visible details include a trigger guard, magazine release, and a muzzle device at the barrel's end.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, short barrel, and red dot sight, finished in olive drab and black. Designed for maneuverability and rapid aiming in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular red dot sight, muzzle, and the symmetrical, angular body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the skeletonized stock, magazine well, and the overall compact profile.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the adjustable stock and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the magazine, grip, and the tactical features of the rifle.
